Suzhou Wanlong Electric Group Co., Ltd. is a highly mature, mid-sized Tier-1/Tier-2 manufacturer and system integrator specializing in power transmission, distribution, and industrial control equipment. Established in 2004 and operating as an unlisted joint-stock company with a robust paid-in capital of 77 Million RMB and nearly 100 insured employees, it represents a substantial physical and engineering footprint in the Suzhou Industrial Park. Beyond manufacturing high/low voltage electrical components, its extensive business scope—covering power plant systems, marine electrical automation, building intelligence, and EV charging infrastructure—indicates strong capabilities in complex 'turnkey' engineering projects (EPC) and system integration. The inclusion of industrial/residential property leasing suggests it also owns significant physical real estate assets within the Free Trade Zone.
